overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired character exploring a medieval stone town at dusk. The character ascends wooden stairs, traverses elevated walkways, and explores a torch-lit courtyard with a central fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone alley with exterior wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs along the stone building wall in a narrow alley

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall with large blocks and mortar lines
dark wooden door with metal studs set in stone archway
steep exterior wooden staircase attached to the building
decorative stone corner blocks on building edge

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow stone alley, ascending an exterior wooden staircase attached to the historic stone building. The space is tightly enclosed with minimal natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with view of town square

events.description: emerges from narrow alley onto elevated wooden balcony overlooking the town

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden balcony and observing the distant red-lit manor house

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the elevated walkway
simple wooden balustrade along the walkway edge
large multi-story building with glowing red windows and banners
red and black fabric banner hanging from wooden pole

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated wooden walkway, revealing a panoramic view of a medieval town square below. The red-lit manor house dominates the distant view as the character proceeds along the balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending from balcony through stone archway passage

events.description: begins descending wooden stairs from the elevated walkway
enters covered stone archway leading to courtyard

agents.ego_description: descending the wooden stairs and proceeding through a torch-lit stone archway

notable_agents.action: guard standing with torch near the archway entrance

entered.detail: rounded stone archway with brick voussoirs leading to courtyard
burning torch in metal holder illuminating the passage
wall-mounted iron torches providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the balcony, passes a torch-bearing guard, and enters a covered stone archway. The ground transitions from wooden planks to wet cobblestones as artificial torchlight becomes the primary illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with central fountain and decorative flowers

events.description: exits archway into open courtyard with central fountain
circles around the stone fountain while approaching the manor

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard, circling the fountain and approaching the red-lit manor house

entered.detail: multi-tiered circular stone fountain with water basin
tall flowering plants with red and yellow blooms
metal fire bowls on stands illuminating the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a spacious cobblestone courtyard centered around a multi-tiered stone fountain. Decorative flower bushes and burning braziers line the path as the character approaches the imposing red-lit manor house.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, dim alleyway into a grand, torch-lit courtyard beneath a looming manor. It begins with the character ascending an exterior wooden staircase within a narrow stone corridor where natural light is scarce. As the character reaches the top, the space opens onto an elevated wooden walkway that reveals a panoramic view of the medieval town square and a distant red-lit manor house. The camera then follows the descent from the balcony, passing a torch-bearing guard and moving through a stone archway as the footing shifts from wooden planks to wet cobblestones. Finally, the scene expands into a spacious courtyard centered around a multi-tiered stone fountain, where burning braziers and decorative flower bushes lead the way toward the imposing manor.
